name: The Chain Workshop

name: The Chain Workshop
surprises: Multiple changes, 1 rollback didnt help, we had to rollback all Bitcoin related changes.
learnedToday: To take command and fix the issue ASAP

name: The Switch
surprises: First it started off slowly, intermittent issues and then increased to higher severity issue.
learnedToday: HBow to navigate and gather as much info as possible. Make sure who is responsible of what role.

name: The Switch
surprises: That issue is so long ongoing, no one noticed till now, it was not clear is it critical or not
learnedToday: To not restart without checking risk and to observe wider picture of issue and timeframe

name: Version confusion
surprises: Everything was going as planned, nothing really surprising this time.
learnedToday: Included all the teams that might have any insights. THe incidents may escalate to higher priorities if the impect is more clear. It was fun to investigate this and finally to get to root cause.

name: Version confusion
learnedToday: Sometimes best course of action it to ask people to check twice and focus

name: Cart-astrophe

name: Cart-astrophe
learnedToday: To include all engineers if relevant one is not available

name: Bezs Beatles Day!
surprises: I thinki there should be a walk- through regarding the different aspects and pieces of the platform we have access and we can do. the visibility is not enough.

name: Details Matter
surprises: Issue wasnt straightforward, further investigation was required to find the correct root cause.
learnedToday: DO not rush and gather all info possible.

name: Snipe Hunt
surprises: That everyone is OOO, it was hard to get people
learnedToday: That taking responsibility is sometimes best course of action

name: Snipe Hunt
surprises: Multiple necessary people were Out, I pushed the teams with restarts but they did not respond. had to word directly "I approve the restarts" so then they understood that we can proceed with restarts.
learnedToday: Stay calm, dont let metircis and panic scare you and keep moving steadily towards resolution.

name: Details Matter
learnedToday: Sometimes you need root cause over resolution in order to fix it
